author: anon-ab6221f8
content: Resuming in-progress work: backend export.rs (11 tests), frontend download.ts + ExportMenu (6 tests) wired into ProjectGrid/Alerts. Verified auth/bootstrap.ts wraps globalThis.fetch so downloadAuthenticated picks up the bearer token automatically. All 49 dashboard vitest cases + typecheck + clippy clean. Committing the untracked files + 5 modified files as a single scoped commit.
